scripts.worker:ingestion: DATABASE_URL="$(node scripts/dev-config.mjs go-database-url)" node scripts/dev-env.mjs go run ./cmd/ingestion-worker
scripts.worker:siem: DATABASE_URL="$(node scripts/dev-config.mjs go-database-url)" node scripts/dev-env.mjs go run ./cmd/siem-dispatcher
scripts.worker:google: DATABASE_URL="$(node scripts/dev-config.mjs go-database-url)" node scripts/dev-env.mjs go run ./cmd/google-workspace-poller
scripts.smoke:workers:go: npm run worker:ingestion -- -once -limit 1 && npm run worker:siem -- -once -limit 1 && npm run smoke:siem:adapters
scripts.mcp:broker: DATABASE_URL="$(node scripts/dev-config.mjs go-database-url)" node scripts/dev-env.mjs go run ./cmd/mcp-broker
scripts.guardrails:migration: tsx --test tests/migration-ownership-guardrails.test.ts tests/auth-client-cleanup.test.ts tests/worker-command-guardrails.test.ts tests/ingestion-parity-matrix.test.ts tests/foundation-cutover-harness.test.ts tests/e2e-smoke-contract.test.ts tests/droid-review-preflight.test.ts
scripts.proto:check: npm run proto:lint && npm run proto:generate && git add --intent-to-add -- gen packages/connect/src/gen && git diff --exit-code -- gen packages/connect/src/gen
scripts.verify:go: npm run proto:check && npm run test:go
scripts.verify: npm run db:generate && npm run typecheck && npm run guardrails:migration && npm run test:api && npm run db:validate && npm run proto:check && npm run test:go && unset DOCKER_HOST && make test-go-db && make lint && npm run build:web && make smoke-workers-go && npm run smoke:e2e && npm run audit:prod && npm run leak:check
